notes: Seed product database. status: active | situational | benched. Benched items ship enabled:false with benchedReason; re-enabling requires user confirmation in-app. Fields tagged for engine use: slots, activeTags, conflictTags, conditions.

products.name: Curél Intensive Moisture Care Cleansing Oil
products.function: Mineral oil + emulsifiers dissolve SPF/wax/sebum; dipotassium glycyrrhizate anti-inflammatory. Fragrance-free, alcohol-free.
products.technique: 3–4 pumps to DRY hands, onto DRY face. Massage ~60s, add water to emulsify until milky, rinse.
products.leaveOn: About 60 seconds of massage, emulsify, then rinse.

products.name: Curél Intensive Moisture Care Foaming Wash
products.function: Amino-acid surfactants + dipotassium glycyrrhizate; gentle, low-strip. Fragrance-free.
products.technique: 1–2 pumps, lather in hands, circular motions, lukewarm rinse, pat dry.
products.leaveOn: 20–30 seconds of gentle circles, then rinse.

products.name: CeraVe SA Smoothing Cleanser
products.function: SA wash-off (contact too short for true BHA effect — value is the cleanse); ceramides + niacinamide barrier support. Fragrance-free.
products.technique: 1–2 pumps in the gym shower, wet skin, circular motions, rinse.
products.leaveOn: About 30 seconds in the shower, then rinse.

products.name: Benzac AC Wash 5%
products.function: 5% benzoyl peroxide — antibacterial vs C. acnes; strong evidence for inflammatory acne. Oil-free, fragrance-free.
products.technique: Short-contact: apply to wet skin, leave 60–90s, rinse. Dedicated dark towel (bleaches fabric).
products.leaveOn: Leave 60–90 seconds, then rinse thoroughly.

products.name: Paula's Choice Skin Balancing Pore-Reducing Toner
products.function: Niacinamide ~2% (strong for oil/barrier), ceramides, oil-soluble vit C, panthenol, HA. Fragrance-free, alcohol-free.
products.technique: Pour a 50c-coin pool to palm (or saturate a pad), pat over face.
products.leaveOn: Pat in; about 1 minute to absorb.

products.name: One By Kose Balancing Tuner Oil Control Lotion
products.function: Rice Power No.6 sebum suppression (brand claim); potassium alum astringent (real but temporary); vit C derivative. Contains alcohol + fragrance.
products.technique: 50c-coin pool to palm or pad, pat T-zone/oily areas only.
products.leaveOn: Pat on the T-zone; about 1 minute to settle.

products.name: One By Kose Serum Veil Deep Repair
products.function: Rice Power No.11 (rice ferment filtrate) — the one Japanese-approved active shown to support the skin’s own ceramide synthesis — with super hyaluronic acid and squalane. Barrier repair for nights when BHA work stacks up. Reduced alcohol, light fragrance.
products.technique: 1 pump, press in.
products.leaveOn: Press in; about 1 minute to absorb.

products.name: Hada Labo Shirojyun Premium (blue)
products.function: Tranexamic acid (strong for PIH), dipotassium glycyrrhizate, vit C derivative, tocopherol, HA. Alcohol-free, fragrance-free. Daily TXA default.
products.technique: Pour to palm, pat all over, extra press into cheeks.
products.leaveOn: Pat in; about 1 minute to absorb.

products.name: Hada Labo Gokujyun Premium (gold)
products.function: Pure HA hydration, NO TXA. Replaces Shirojyun only when zero actives wanted.
products.technique: As Shirojyun: pour to palm, pat all over.
products.leaveOn: Pat in; about 1 minute to absorb.

products.name: Hada Labo Gokujyun Light (white)
products.function: Lightweight hyaluronic-acid lotion (multiple HA weights), no actives — pure watery hydration. Overlaps entirely with Shirojyun and Gokujyun Premium, which is why it sits out.
products.leaveOn: Pat in; about 1 minute to absorb.

products.name: Melano CC Men Essence
products.function: L-ascorbic acid (strong for brightening/PIH), B6, IPMP antibacterial, LOW-% SALICYLIC ACID. Alcohol + fragrance.
products.technique: ~10c-coin pool to palm (several drops), press into forehead/each cheek/nose/chin. Don't rub.
products.leaveOn: Press in; about 1 minute to absorb.

products.name: Melano CC Premium Essence
products.function: Ascorbic acid + 3 vit C derivatives (stronger brightening), B6, allantoin, tocopherol. Alcohol + fragrance. NO salicylic acid.
products.technique: ~10c-coin pool, press onto full face.
products.leaveOn: Press in; about 1 minute to absorb.

products.name: Paula's Choice 2% BHA Liquid Exfoliant
products.function: 2% salicylic acid, pH-optimised — pore declogging, comedonal + some inflammatory acne. Gold-standard OTC.
products.technique: Small amount to palm/pad, thin layer full face, around (not over) open spots.
products.waitNote: 5–10 min wait is non-negotiable before the next layer.
products.leaveOn: Leave on — the 5–10 minute wait before the next layer is the point.

products.name: Differin Adapalene Gel 0.1%
products.function: Adapalene retinoid — cell turnover, comedolysis, PIH clearance. Gentlest retinoid, strong evidence. Fragrance-free.
products.technique: Pea-sized to full face on COMPLETELY DRY skin (intro phases: tiny amount to the assigned test zone only).
products.waitNote: Previous layer must be fully absorbed and skin dry before applying; wait until absorbed, then moisturiser.
products.leaveOn: Leave on overnight; let it absorb fully before moisturiser.

products.name: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Ampoule
products.function: Centella asiatica anti-inflammatory/calming, glycerin. 7 ingredients, fragrance-free, alcohol-free.
products.technique: 3–4 dropper squeezes, press gently over face.
products.leaveOn: Press in; about 1 minute to absorb.

products.name: Cos De BAHA TN Serum
products.function: Tranexamic acid 5% + niacinamide 5% (both clinically meaningful), HA, allantoin, green tea. Alcohol-free, fragrance-free.
products.technique: 3–4 dropper squeezes, press onto full face.
products.leaveOn: Press in; about 1 minute to absorb.

products.name: Attonon Scar Gel
products.function: Kobayashi scar-care gel: heparinoid softens and regenerates, with vitamin C glucoside, dipotassium glycyrrhizate and IPMP. Raised or textured scars only — flat PIH will not respond to this.
products.technique: Thin dab on specific raised scars, after moisturiser. Confirm raised scarring actually present first.
products.leaveOn: Dab on raised scars; rubs in within 30 seconds.

products.name: Anua 10% Azelaic Acid
products.benchedReason: Permanently retired — suspected breakout trigger (May 2026). Never recommend.
products.function: Azelaic acid 10% cream-gel — comedolytic and anti-inflammatory on paper, but correlated with a breakout cluster in May 2026. Retired for good.
products.leaveOn: Was leave-on; retired from the routine.

products.name: The Ordinary Niacinamide 10% + Zinc 1%
products.benchedReason: Redundant — niacinamide covered by PC toner and TN serum.
products.function: Niacinamide 10% + zinc PCA 1% — oil regulation and barrier support. The routine already gets steady niacinamide from the PC toner (~2%) and TN serum (5%); 10% on top adds irritation risk, not benefit.
products.leaveOn: Leave on; about 1 minute to absorb.

products.name: COSRX Snail 92 All In One Cream
products.function: 92% snail secretion filtrate (hydration/repair), betaine, dimethicone. Default PM moisturiser.
products.technique: Pea-to-almond amount, press and pat over face.
products.leaveOn: Leave on; 1–2 minutes to settle before anything else.

products.name: Curél Moisture Facial Cream
products.function: Pseudo-ceramide, squalane, allantoin — barrier repair. Too heavy for daily oily use.
products.technique: Scoop small amount with clean fingertips. Cheeks only on reactive nights; T-zone stays Snail 92.
products.leaveOn: Leave on overnight; no wait needed after.

products.name: Pair Acne Cream W
products.function: Lion OTC spot treatment: ibuprofen piconol 3% (anti-inflammatory) + IPMP 0.3% (antibacterial) — calms early inflamed spots. Does nothing for closed comedones.
products.technique: Thin fingertip dab on INDIVIDUAL spots only, ABSOLUTE LAST step after moisturiser. Never spread across a cluster, never preventive.
products.leaveOn: Leave on overnight — dab on, don’t rub in.

products.name: VT Pro Cica Clear Spot Patch
products.function: Draws fluid from whiteheads, protects burst spots; centella derivatives calm. Near-invisible — daytime/under-CC default.
products.technique: On CLEAN, BARE, DRY skin BEFORE all products. Routine goes around it.
products.leaveOn: Wear through the day (8+ hours); replace when the centre turns white.

products.name: COSRX Master Patch Original Fit
products.function: Standard hydrocolloid, higher capacity, secure flat profile. Overnight extraction/pillow barrier.
products.technique: Clean/bare/dry skin. Overnight pillow barrier on closed lumps (jaw underside, neck, sideburn). EXCEPTION: as pillow barrier it goes OVER settled Pair as the final step.
products.leaveOn: Wear overnight; peel off in the morning.

products.name: COSRX Snail 96 Mucin Power Essence
products.function: 96% snail secretion filtrate essence — the lighter, runnier sibling of Snail 92. Same mucin repair story, fully covered by Snail 92.
products.leaveOn: Leave on; 1–2 minutes to absorb.

products.name: Curél Deep Moisture Spray
products.function: Ceramide-care moisture mist for on-the-go top-ups. Pleasant, but adds nothing the leave-ons don’t already do.
products.leaveOn: Mist as needed; no wait.

products.name: La Roche-Posay Effaclar Clay Mask
products.function: Kaolin + panthenol — gentle oil control. Preferred during reactive/breakout weeks.
products.technique: Thin layer after cleanse, avoid lumps/wounds/patches. 5 min, rinse.
products.leaveOn: 5 minutes on, then rinse.

products.name: Innisfree Super Volcanic Pore Clay Mask 2X
products.function: Volcanic ash, bentonite, kaolin + lactic acid (AHA) — deeper pore clearing.
products.technique: Scoop with clean fingertips, thin layer, 10 min, rinse.
products.leaveOn: 10 minutes on, then rinse.

products.name: Quality 1st Derma Laser Super VC100 Sheet Mask
products.function: Four vitamin C forms (ascorbic acid, APPS, ascorbyl tetrahexyldecanoate, MAP) plus niacinamide and ceramide NP in a nano-capsule essence — the strongest brightening match for the acne + PIH goals. Contains essential oils; restock the same variant.
products.technique: After PC toner + Shirojyun. 10–15 min, remove, pat in (don't rinse). REPLACES the serum step. Snail 92 after.
products.leaveOn: 10–15 minutes on, then pat the rest in — don’t rinse.

products.name: Anua Heartleaf 77% Sheet Mask
products.function: Heartleaf soothing — complementary option for reactive/sensitive nights.
products.technique: After PC toner + Shirojyun, 10–15 min, pat in. Replaces serum step.
products.leaveOn: 10–15 minutes on, then pat the rest in.

products.name: Anessa Perfect UV Milk (Gold) SPF50+ PA++++
products.function: Default office/commute/gym SPF. Sweat-resistant.
products.technique: Last AM skincare step. Shake, two-finger strip, press in.
products.leaveOn: Give it 2–3 minutes to set before CC cream or heading out.

products.name: Beauty of Joseon Relief Sun Aqua-Fresh SPF50+ PA++++
products.function: Casual outdoor/errand tier. Semi-matte, B5 for dehydrated-oily. Aqua-Fresh version only.
products.technique: Two-finger strip, press in.
products.leaveOn: Give it 2–3 minutes to set before heading out.

products.name: Biore UV Aqua Rich Light Up Essence
products.function: WFH/incidental-sun tier. Neutral finish, less sweat-resistant than Anessa.
products.technique: Two-finger strip, press in.
products.leaveOn: Give it 2–3 minutes to set.

products.name: La Roche-Posay Anthelios XL Anti-Shine SPF50+
products.function: Hot/humid escalation (35°C+) only. Dormant until summer.
products.technique: PAT on, don't rub (pilling).
products.leaveOn: Give it 2–3 minutes to set.

products.name: IT Cosmetics CC+ Cream SPF50
products.function: Coverage; treat its SPF as bonus — Anessa remains primary.
products.technique: After SPF sets (2–3 min). Press/pat with fingertips.
products.leaveOn: No wait — pat until blended.

products.name: La Roche-Posay Anthelios Invisible Fluid
products.function: Very light organic-filter SPF50+ fluid. Elegant to wear, but the dewy finish reads shiny on an oily T-zone.
products.leaveOn: Give it 2–3 minutes to set.

products.name: Maro Deo Scalp Shampoo
products.function: Men’s scalp shampoo with a deodorising persimmon-tannin complex — cuts wax and sebum without sulfate-level stripping.
products.technique: PM on wax/post-gym-evening nights. Always with Muji scrubber, gentle circles.
products.leaveOn: Lather about 30 seconds, then rinse.

products.name: Maro Deo Treatment
products.function: The matching scalp-safe conditioner — restores slip after the deo shampoo without clogging follicles.
products.technique: After Maro shampoo — scalp AND hair. Massage in, few min, rinse.
products.leaveOn: Leave 2–3 minutes on scalp and hair, then rinse.

products.name: Sukin Natural Balance Shampoo
products.function: Mild Australian botanical shampoo — the everyday non-wax cleanse for gym mornings.
products.technique: With Muji scrubber, gentle circles.
products.leaveOn: Lather about 30 seconds, then rinse.

products.name: Himawari Rich & Repair Conditioner
products.function: Sunflower-lipid repair conditioner, scalp-safe (rule updated 06/06/2026) — smooths lengths without heavy silicone buildup at the roots.
products.technique: Squeeze excess water first, 1–2 min, rinse.
products.leaveOn: Leave 1–2 minutes, then rinse.

products.name: Batiste Dry Shampoo 24H Active
products.function: Starch-based aerosol dry shampoo — soaks up sebum at the roots. True emergencies only: it masks, it doesn’t clean.
products.technique: Emergency use.
products.leaveOn: Spray, massage in, brush out — no wait.

products.name: Dermaveen Oatmeal Conditioner
products.function: Colloidal-oatmeal conditioner for sensitive scalps. The Himawari covers this slot.
products.leaveOn: Leave 1–2 minutes, then rinse.

products.name: Uevo Grey Design Cube Dry Wax
products.function: Matte dry wax for office/formal hold. Wax residue near the hairline is comedogenic — Maro shampoo is mandatory that night.
products.technique: Dry hair, after blowdry.
products.leaveOn: Stays in until washed out — Maro shampoo that night.

products.name: Brickell Texturising Sea Salt Spray
products.function: Sea-salt texturiser for casual days, or as a grip layer under wax.
products.technique: On damp hair.
products.leaveOn: Air-dries in a couple of minutes.

products.name: L'Eau d'Issey Pour Homme
products.function: Woody-aquatic office/formal fragrance. Alcohol spray — pulse points only, never near treated facial skin.
products.technique: Pulse points, last step, dry skin. Never on face or SPF neck.
products.leaveOn: Spray and go — pulse points only.

products.name: Urbane Mess Salt Spray
products.benchedReason: Do not restock — redundant with Brickell.
products.function: Sea-salt texturising spray — a duplicate of the Brickell.
products.leaveOn: Air-dries in a couple of minutes.

products.name: Moilip
products.function: Shiseido medicated lip repair: allantoin and glycyrrhetinic acid calm inflammation; panthenol, vitamin E and B6 support healing. For cracked or chapped lips, not just shine.
products.technique: Apply as needed.
products.leaveOn: Leave on; reapply as needed through the day.

products.name: Rohto Melty Cream Lip SPF25 PA+++
products.function: Going-out lip with SPF.
products.technique: Apply before leaving, reapply outdoors.
products.leaveOn: Leave on; reapply when outdoors.

products.name: Yuskin Relip Cure
products.function: Vitamin B2/E lip treatment for cracked lips. Moilip covers the medicated-lip slot.
products.leaveOn: Leave on overnight.

products.name: Carmex
products.function: Classic menthol–camphor–salicylic lip balm. The tingle works against you: menthol and camphor are net-drying on already-dry lips.
products.leaveOn: Leave on; reapply as needed.

products.name: Certain Dri Extra Strength
products.function: Office antiperspirant.
products.technique: Gym-then-office days: after post-gym shower, before leaving. Non-gym office days: night before.
products.leaveOn: Let it dry 2–3 minutes before dressing or bed.

products.name: Rexona Advanced Protection Roll-On
products.function: Primary everyday deodorant — gym mornings + weekends.
products.technique: Apply AM.
products.leaveOn: Let it dry about a minute before dressing.

products.name: Rexona Clinical Sport Spray
products.function: Clinical-strength aerosol antiperspirant, held in reserve for big days.
products.leaveOn: Dries in seconds.

products.name: Certain Dri Prescription Strength
products.function: Aluminium-chloride clinical antiperspirant — the strongest OTC option, but it irritated the skin. Extra Strength is the ceiling.
products.leaveOn: Let it dry fully before bed.

products.name: AG Deo 24 Stick
products.benchedReason: Patch test pending — enable after clearing.
products.function: Japanese silver-ion (Ag+) deodorant stick — waiting on a patch test before it earns a place.
products.leaveOn: Goes on dry — no wait.

products.name: Dermaveen Intensive Moisturising Cream
products.function: Shoulders/body when dry, mostly winter.
products.technique: Apply to dry areas post-shower.
products.leaveOn: Rubs in within a minute.

products.name: Curél Moisture Hand Cream
products.function: Dry hands, mostly winter.
products.technique: As needed.
products.leaveOn: Rubs in within a minute.

products.name: Braun Series 7 + Clean Station
products.function: Office/outing shave.
products.technique: Clean dry skin, BEFORE any skincare product.
products.leaveOn: n/a — tool.

products.name: Muji Scalp Scrubber
products.function: Scalp cleanse aid with both shampoos.
products.technique: Gentle circles.
products.leaveOn: n/a — tool.

products.name: Long-Handle Body Scrubber
products.function: Daily back cleanse.
products.technique: Daily, back.
products.leaveOn: n/a — tool.

products.name: Remington PROLUXE HydraCare Dryer
products.function: Blowdry before wax.
products.technique: Medium heat only.
products.leaveOn: n/a — tool.
